scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet Muhammad confidently prepares for battle against the hypocrites and Jews.

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 159
schema_output.moral_lesson: Courage and determination in the face of adversity

characters.name: The Prophet Muhammad
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad prepares for battle, drawing his sword and ready to face the hypocrites and Jews.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast, open desert battlefield under a clear morning sky with a gentle breeze blowing from the left. The sun rises high in the east, casting a warm golden light across the sandy dunes and rocky outcrops. In the distance, a small group of armed men, dressed in simple white thobes and brown cloaks, can be seen gathering around a lone figure. The central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended, drawing a gleaming sword from its scabbard. Soft warm golden light, dramatic and heroic mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm beige, golden, and deep green palette. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
